scripts.db:generate: docker compose exec workspace sh -c 'export INFISICAL_TOKEN=$(infisical login --method=universal-auth --silent --plain) && infisical run --projectId=$INFISICAL_PROJECT_ID --env=dev -- pnpm --filter backend db:generate'
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec workspace sh -c 'export INFISICAL_TOKEN=$(infisical login --method=universal-auth --silent --plain) && infisical run --projectId=$INFISICAL_PROJECT_ID --env=dev -- pnpm --filter backend db:migrate'
